nodes.name: Emberiza
nodes.summary: Emberiza（Emberiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如Cabanis's bunting、Brown-rumped bunting、Cape bunting等42种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gosling's bunting
nodes.summary: Gosling's bunting (Emberiza goslingi), also known as the grey-throated bunting, is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae. It is found in Africa from Mauritania and Senegal to south-western Sudan and north-eastern Democratic Republic of Congo. Its natural habitats are dry savannah, subtropical or tropical dry shrubland, and subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland. It was previously considered conspecific with the cinnamon-breasted bunting. References
